name: Garth Brooks
description: American country music singer and songwriter
abstract: Troyal Garth Brooks (born February 7, 1962) is an American country singer and songwriter. His musical style blends traditional country with pop and rock elements, which has earned him his immense popularity, particularly in the United States, with success on the country music single and album charts, multi-platinum recordings and record-…

about_quotes.speaker: Duffy Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: I’m also attempting to be an astute observer of why Garth Brooks is a multi-millionaire
about_quotes.doc_title: Duffy Jackson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 17, 1995
